## Type

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 🎨 New / updated theme
- [ ] 📦 New / updated module
- [ ] 📚 Documentation
- [ ] 🔧 Tooling / CI / build
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change

## Linked issue

<!-- Closes #123 -->

## Testing

- [ ] I ran `npm run build` in `astro-starter/` — passes
- [ ] I tested locally — describe how
- [ ] I tested on at least one real WordPress site
- [ ] I added/updated tests where applicable

For theme PRs:
- [ ] Lighthouse Performance ≥ 90 mobile, ≥ 95 desktop
- [ ] Lighthouse SEO = 100
- [ ] Lighthouse Accessibility ≥ 95
- [ ] Mobile responsive at 320 / 375 / 768 / 1024 / 1440 px
- [ ] Dark mode works
- [ ] Screenshots committed in `themes/[name]/screenshots/`

For WP plugin PRs:
- [ ] PHP lint passes (`composer phpcs`)
- [ ] WPCS WordPress Coding Standards pass
- [ ] No `var_dump` / debug statements left
- [ ] Sanitization on all input, escaping on all output, nonces on all forms

For module PRs:
- [ ] TypeScript strict mode passes (`tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] ESLint passes
- [ ] README updated with usage example

## Screenshots / GIFs

<!-- Drag images here. Required for any UI change. -->

## Anything maintainers should know?

<!-- Performance considerations, breaking changes, alternative approaches you considered, etc. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the existing style (TypeScript strict, ESLint, WPCS for PHP)
- [ ] I updated relevant docs (README, ARCHITECTURE, ROADMAP, FAQ)
- [ ] I added myself to CONTRIBUTORS if this is my first PR
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/adityaarsharma/hatch/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
